Terran_Scrap Mine:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 52 52">
<defs>
  <linearGradient id="tb01-base" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.2" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1a4060"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#050d14"/></linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="tb01-side" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0d2a40"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#02080f"/></linearGradient>
  <radialGradient id="tb01-drill" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00d4ff"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#00b4ff" stop-opacity="0.6"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00b4ff" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>
  <filter id="tb01-glow" x="-60%" y="-60%" width="220%" height="220%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.8" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
</defs>
<!-- base platform -->
<polygon points="6,34 26,26 46,34 46,42 26,50 6,42" fill="url(#tb01-base)" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.9"/>
<polygon points="6,34 26,26 26,34 6,42" fill="url(#tb01-side)" opacity="0.85"/>
<polygon points="26,26 46,34 46,42 26,34" fill="#0a1f2e" opacity="0.9"/>
<!-- top face plate seams -->
<line x1="6" y1="38" x2="46" y2="38" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.3"/>
<line x1="26" y1="26" x2="26" y2="34" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.25"/>
<!-- drill collar ring — centre -->
<ellipse cx="26" cy="32" rx="6" ry="3.5" fill="#050d14" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.8"/>
<ellipse cx="26" cy="32" rx="4"  ry="2.2" fill="url(#tb01-drill)" filter="url(#tb01-glow)" opacity="0.9"/>
<circle  cx="26" cy="32" r="1.5" fill="#00d4ff" opacity="0.95"/>
<!-- drill shaft descending -->
<rect x="24.5" y="32" width="3" height="8" rx="0.5" fill="#0d2a40" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.8"/>
<!-- drill bit markings -->
<line x1="25.5" y1="34" x2="27.5" y2="34" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.5"/>
<line x1="25.5" y1="36" x2="27.5" y2="36" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.45"/>
<!-- ore conveyor belt — left -->
<polygon points="6,34 16,30 16,38 6,42" fill="#08192a" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<line x1="7"  y1="34" x2="15" y2="31" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.4"/>
<line x1="7"  y1="36" x2="15" y2="33" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.35"/>
<line x1="7"  y1="38" x2="15" y2="35" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.3"/>
<!-- ore hopper bin -->
<polygon points="6,26 14,22 14,30 6,34" fill="url(#tb01-base)"/>
<polygon points="6,26 14,22 16,24 8,28" fill="#1a4060" opacity="0.7"/>
<rect x="7" y="27" width="6" height="4" rx="0.5" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.15"/>
<!-- exhaust stacks — two -->
<rect x="33" y="16" width="3.5" height="12" rx="0.5" fill="url(#tb01-base)" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<ellipse cx="34.75" cy="16" rx="2"  ry="1" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.5"/>
<ellipse cx="34.75" cy="14" rx="1.5" ry="0.8" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.35" filter="url(#tb01-glow)"/>
<rect x="38.5" y="19" width="3" height="9" rx="0.5" fill="url(#tb01-base)" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4"/>
<ellipse cx="40" cy="19" rx="1.7" ry="0.8" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.45"/>
<ellipse cx="40" cy="17" rx="1.3" ry="0.7" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.3" filter="url(#tb01-glow)"/>
<!-- structure frame struts -->
<line x1="26" y1="26" x2="34" y2="20" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.4"/>
<line x1="26" y1="26" x2="38" y2="22" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.35"/>
<!-- base bolts -->
<circle cx="10"  cy="40" r="1"   fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.4"/>
<circle cx="26"  cy="48" r="1"   fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.4"/>
<circle cx="42"  cy="40" r="1"   fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.4"/>
</svg>
Terran_Sensor Spire:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 52 52">
<defs>
  <linearGradient id="tb02-mast" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.3" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00d4ff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0d2a40"/></linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="tb02-base" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.2" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1a4060"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#050d14"/></linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="tb02-side" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0d2a40"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#02080f"/></linearGradient>
  <radialGradient id="tb02-dish" cx="40%" cy="38%" r="60%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00d4ff" stop-opacity="0.7"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#00b4ff" stop-opacity="0.25"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00b4ff" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>
  <radialGradient id="tb02-tip" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="#00d4ff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00b4ff" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>
  <filter id="tb02-glow" x="-80%" y="-80%" width="260%" height="260%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2.2" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
  <filter id="tb02-soft" x="-30%" y="-30%" width="160%" height="160%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.2" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
</defs>
<!-- base pad -->
<polygon points="12,42 26,36 40,42 40,48 26,52 12,48" fill="url(#tb02-base)" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.7"/>
<polygon points="12,42 26,36 26,42 12,48" fill="url(#tb02-side)" opacity="0.9"/>
<polygon points="26,36 40,42 40,48 26,42" fill="#0a1f2e" opacity="0.85"/>
<!-- base details -->
<ellipse cx="26" cy="39" rx="5" ry="2.5" fill="#050d14" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<!-- guy-wire braces — 4 cables -->
<line x1="26" y1="8"  x2="12" y2="38" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.35"/>
<line x1="26" y1="8"  x2="40" y2="38" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.35"/>
<line x1="26" y1="10" x2="14" y2="40" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.25"/>
<line x1="26" y1="10" x2="38" y2="40" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.25"/>
<!-- mast — main vertical shaft -->
<rect x="24.5" y="6" width="3" height="34" rx="0.8" fill="url(#tb02-mast)"/>
<rect x="25"   y="6" width="2" height="34" rx="0.6" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.08"/>
<!-- mast section rings -->
<rect x="23.5" y="18" width="5" height="2"   rx="0.4" fill="#1a4060" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<rect x="23.5" y="28" width="5" height="1.5" rx="0.4" fill="#1a4060" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4"/>
<!-- antenna spines — 3 at mid-height -->
<line x1="26" y1="20" x2="36" y2="16" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.7"/>
<circle cx="36" cy="16" r="1.2" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.7" filter="url(#tb02-soft)"/>
<line x1="26" y1="20" x2="16" y2="17" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.65"/>
<circle cx="16" cy="17" r="1" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.65" filter="url(#tb02-soft)"/>
<line x1="26" y1="22" x2="38" y2="22" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.6"/>
<circle cx="38" cy="22" r="1" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.6" filter="url(#tb02-soft)"/>
<!-- parabolic dish — top, angled -->
<path d="M26,8 Q34,4 40,8 Q36,14 26,12 Z" fill="url(#tb02-dish)" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.9"/>
<path d="M26,8 Q34,4 40,8" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="0.6" fill="none" opacity="0.6"/>
<!-- dish strut -->
<line x1="26" y1="8" x2="34" y2="6" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.55"/>
<!-- tip beacon -->
<circle cx="26" cy="4" r="2.5" fill="url(#tb02-tip)" filter="url(#tb02-glow)" opacity="0.95"/>
<circle cx="26" cy="4" r="1.2" fill="#fff" opacity="0.97"/>
<!-- signal pulse rings -->
<circle cx="26" cy="4" r="4"   fill="none" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.3" filter="url(#tb02-soft)"/>
<circle cx="26" cy="4" r="6.5" fill="none" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.18" filter="url(#tb02-soft)"/>
</svg>
Terran_Embassy:

<!-- roof — isometric top face -->

<line x1="26" y1="14" x2="26" y2="22" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.25"/>

<!-- right wall face -->

<line x1="10" y1="30" x2="10.5" y2="48" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.45"/>
<line x1="13" y1="31" x2="13.5" y2="49" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.42"/>
<line x1="16" y1="32.5" x2="16.5" y2="49.5" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.4"/>
<line x1="19" y1="34" x2="19.5" y2="50" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.38"/>
<line x1="22" y1="35.5" x2="22.5" y2="50" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.35"/>
<line x1="25" y1="37" x2="25.5" y2="50" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.32"/>
<!-- column capitals — top dots -->
<circle cx="10"  cy="30"   r="0.9" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.55"/>
<circle cx="13"  cy="31"   r="0.9" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.52"/>
<circle cx="16"  cy="32.5" r="0.9" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.5"/>
<circle cx="19"  cy="34"   r="0.9" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.48"/>
<circle cx="22"  cy="35.5" r="0.9" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.45"/>
<circle cx="25"  cy="37"   r="0.9" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.42"/>
<!-- entry arch -->
<path d="M17,38 Q19,34 21,38" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.9" fill="none" opacity="0.65"/>
<rect x="17" y="38" width="4" height="6" rx="0.3" fill="#050d14" opacity="0.8"/>

<polygon points="13,34 15,33 17,34 17,36 15,37 13,36" fill="none" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.6"/>
<circle cx="15" cy="35" r="1" fill="url(#tb03-emblem)" filter="url(#tb03-glow)" opacity="0.85"/>
<!-- flag poles — two on roof -->
<line x1="18" y1="14" x2="18" y2="6" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.6"/>
<polygon points="18,6 23,8 18,10" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.55"/>
<line x1="34" y1="14" x2="34" y2="6" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.6"/>
<polygon points="34,6 39,8 34,10" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.55"/>
<!-- right wall windows -->
<rect x="30" y="32" width="4" height="3" rx="0.4" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.15" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4"/>
<rect x="36" y="30" width="4" height="3" rx="0.4" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.12" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4"/>
<!-- base step -->
<polygon points="6,42 26,50 26,52 6,44" fill="#0a1f2e" opacity="0.7"/>
<polygon points="26,50 44,42 44,44 26,52" fill="#060f18" opacity="0.7"/>
</svg>

<rect x="11" y="36" width="5" height="6" rx="0.4" fill="url(#tb04-bay)" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<rect x="12" y="37" width="3" height="4" rx="0.2" fill="#00b4ff" opacity="0.1"/>
<line x1="13.5" y1="37" x2="13.5" y2="41" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.4"/>
<rect x="17" y="38" width="5" height="6" rx="0.4" fill="url(#tb04-bay)" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.6"/>

<line x1="48" y1="28" x2="54" y2="24" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.5"/>

<line x1="6"  y1="40" x2="28" y2="50" stroke="#00b4ff" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>

  <linearGradient id="sb13-roof" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.2" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#143838"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#031616"/></linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="sb13-wall" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.2" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0c2c2c"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#021010"/></linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="sb13-side" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#071c1c"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#010808"/></linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="sb13-spire" x1="0.3" y1="0" x2="0.7" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00ffee"/><stop offset="42%" stop-color="#0e3434"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#031414"/></linearGradient>
  <radialGradient id="sb13-pad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="55%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0.4"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0.1"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>
  <radialGradient id="sb13-gem" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="#00ffee"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>
  <radialGradient id="sb13-beacon" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff"/><stop offset="22%" stop-color="#00ffee"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>
  <filter id="sb13-glow" x="-80%" y="-80%" width="260%" height="260%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2.2" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
  <filter id="sb13-soft" x="-30%" y="-30%" width="160%" height="160%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.2" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
</defs>
<!-- wide flat roof -->
<polygon points="2,26 26,14 50,26 50,36 26,48 2,36" fill="url(#sb13-roof)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.7"/>
<polygon points="2,26 26,14 26,26 2,36" fill="#091e1e" opacity="0.78"/>
<polygon points="26,14 50,26 50,36 26,26" fill="#050e0e" opacity="0.88"/>
<line x1="2" y1="31" x2="50" y2="31" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.18"/>
<!-- four void-pad landing circles on roof -->
<circle cx="12" cy="22" r="4.5" fill="url(#sb13-pad)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.6" filter="url(#sb13-soft)"/>
<circle cx="12" cy="22" r="2.5" fill="none" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.4"/>
<circle cx="12" cy="22" r="1.5" fill="url(#sb13-gem)" filter="url(#sb13-glow)" opacity="0.82"/>
<circle cx="12" cy="22" r="0.7" fill="#fff" opacity="0.95"/>
<circle cx="22" cy="18" r="4"   fill="url(#sb13-pad)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5" filter="url(#sb13-soft)"/>
<circle cx="22" cy="18" r="2.2" fill="none" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.38"/>
<circle cx="22" cy="18" r="1.3" fill="url(#sb13-gem)" filter="url(#sb13-glow)" opacity="0.8"/>
<circle cx="22" cy="18" r="0.6" fill="#fff" opacity="0.92"/>
<circle cx="32" cy="18" r="4"   fill="url(#sb13-pad)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5" filter="url(#sb13-soft)"/>
<circle cx="32" cy="18" r="2.2" fill="none" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.38"/>
<circle cx="32" cy="18" r="1.3" fill="url(#sb13-gem)" filter="url(#sb13-glow)" opacity="0.8"/>
<circle cx="32" cy="18" r="0.6" fill="#fff" opacity="0.92"/>
<circle cx="42" cy="22" r="4"   fill="url(#sb13-pad)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5" filter="url(#sb13-soft)"/>
<circle cx="42" cy="22" r="2.2" fill="none" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.35"/>
<circle cx="42" cy="22" r="1.3" fill="url(#sb13-gem)" filter="url(#sb13-glow)" opacity="0.78"/>
<circle cx="42" cy="22" r="0.6" fill="#fff" opacity="0.9"/>
<!-- routing crystal spire — right side -->
<polygon points="38,26 44,22 44,6 38,6" fill="url(#sb13-spire)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<polygon points="38,26 44,22 46,20 40,24" fill="#163838" opacity="0.45"/>
<!-- spire beacon -->
<polygon points="40,6 44,6 42,2" fill="#00ffee" opacity="0.6"/>
<circle cx="42" cy="4" r="2.2" fill="url(#sb13-beacon)" filter="url(#sb13-glow)" opacity="0.92"/>
<circle cx="42" cy="4" r="0.9" fill="#fff" opacity="0.97"/>
<!-- crystal cargo arm extending left -->
<rect x="2" y="22" width="14" height="3" rx="0.5" fill="#0c2e2e" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<line x1="2"  y1="23.5" x2="16" y2="23.5" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.3"/>
<!-- cargo arm tractor emitter -->
<circle cx="2" cy="23.5" r="2.2" fill="#031414" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<circle cx="2" cy="23.5" r="1.2" fill="url(#sb13-gem)" filter="url(#sb13-glow)" opacity="0.8"/>
<!-- front wall -->
<polygon points="2,36 26,48 26,52 2,40" fill="url(#sb13-wall)"/>
<polygon points="26,48 50,36 50,40 26,52" fill="url(#sb13-side)" opacity="0.9"/>
<line x1="2" y1="36" x2="26" y2="48" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.32"/>
<!-- crystal access ramp front face -->
<polygon points="10,44 18,48 18,52 10,48" fill="#0a2828" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<line x1="12" y1="44" x2="12" y2="48" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.35"/>
<line x1="15" y1="46" x2="15" y2="50" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.3"/>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 52 52">
<defs>
  <linearGradient id="sb14-base" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.2" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0c2e2e"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#021010"/></linearGradient>

<!-- base drydock floor -->
<polygon points="4,36 26,24 48,36 48,48 26,52 4,48" fill="url(#sb14-base)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.7"/>
<polygon points="4,36 26,24 26,36 4,48" fill="url(#sb14-side)" opacity="0.82"/>
<polygon points="26,24 48,36 48,48 26,36" fill="#040e0e" opacity="0.9"/>
<line x1="4" y1="42" x2="48" y2="42" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.2"/>
<!-- left shard-tipped pylon tower -->
<polygon points="6,36 12,32 12,6 6,6" fill="url(#sb14-pylon)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.7"/>
<polygon points="6,36 12,32 14,30 8,34" fill="#163838" opacity="0.5"/>
<!-- left pylon shard tip -->
<polygon points="6,6 12,6 9,1" fill="#00ffee" opacity="0.65"/>
<circle cx="9" cy="2" r="2" fill="url(#sb14-node)" filter="url(#sb14-glow)" opacity="0.9"/>
<circle cx="9" cy="2" r="0.9" fill="#fff" opacity="0.97"/>
<!-- right shard-tipped pylon tower -->
<polygon points="40,32 46,36 46,6 40,6" fill="url(#sb14-pylon)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.7"/>
<polygon points="40,32 46,36 48,34 42,30" fill="#163838" opacity="0.5"/>
<!-- right pylon shard tip -->
<polygon points="40,6 46,6 43,1" fill="#00ffee" opacity="0.65"/>
<circle cx="43" cy="2" r="2" fill="url(#sb14-node)" filter="url(#sb14-glow)" opacity="0.9"/>
<circle cx="43" cy="2" r="0.9" fill="#fff" opacity="0.97"/>
<!-- crystal crane arm across gantry -->
<rect x="9" y="8" width="34" height="3" rx="0.5" fill="url(#sb14-crane)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<line x1="9" y1="9.5" x2="43" y2="9.5" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.3"/>
<!-- crane trolley -->
<rect x="20" y="6" width="6" height="5" rx="0.3" fill="#0a2828" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<!-- tractor-beam emitter hanging from trolley -->
<line x1="23" y1="11" x2="23" y2="18" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.5"/>
<circle cx="23" cy="19" r="2.5" fill="url(#sb14-tbeam)" filter="url(#sb14-glow)" opacity="0.85"/>
<circle cx="23" cy="19" r="1"   fill="#00ffee" opacity="0.5"/>
<circle cx="23" cy="19" r="0.5" fill="#fff" opacity="0.9"/>
<!-- tractor beam cone down to hull -->
<polygon points="21,19 25,19 28,30 18,30" fill="url(#sb14-tbeam)" opacity="0.25" filter="url(#sb14-soft)"/>
<!-- blade-like void-ship hull in berth — angular -->
<polygon points="8,30 26,22 44,30 42,36 26,40 10,36" fill="url(#sb14-hull)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.7"/>
<polygon points="8,30 26,22 26,30 8,36" fill="#0c2828" opacity="0.65"/>
<polygon points="26,22 44,30 42,36 26,30" fill="#061414" opacity="0.82"/>
<!-- hull frame ribs -->
<line x1="14" y1="27" x2="14" y2="35" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.3"/>
<line x1="20" y1="24" x2="20" y2="34" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.28"/>
<line x1="32" y1="24" x2="32" y2="34" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.28"/>
<line x1="38" y1="27" x2="38" y2="35" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.25"/>
<!-- crystal cradle brackets under hull -->
<polygon points="8,36 12,34 12,40 8,40" fill="#0c2828" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.7"/>
<polygon points="40,34 44,36 44,40 40,40" fill="#0c2828" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.65"/>
<!-- three welding void-arc glow points -->
<circle cx="14" cy="30" r="2"   fill="url(#sb14-arc)" filter="url(#sb14-glow)" opacity="0.9"/>
<circle cx="14" cy="30" r="0.8" fill="#fff" opacity="0.97"/>
<circle cx="26" cy="25" r="2.2" fill="url(#sb14-arc)" filter="url(#sb14-glow)" opacity="0.92"/>
<circle cx="26" cy="25" r="0.9" fill="#fff" opacity="0.97"/>
<circle cx="38" cy="28" r="1.8" fill="url(#sb14-arc)" filter="url(#sb14-glow)" opacity="0.88"/>
<circle cx="38" cy="28" r="0.8" fill="#fff" opacity="0.95"/>
</svg>

<!-- angular crystal roof -->
<polygon points="4,26 26,14 48,26 48,36 26,48 4,36" fill="url(#sb15-roof)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.7"/>
<polygon points="4,26 26,14 26,26 4,36" fill="#091c1c" opacity="0.78"/>

<polygon points="14,22 26,16 38,22 34,28 26,30 18,28" fill="none" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.3"/>

<line x1="18" y1="28" x2="34" y2="28" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.18"/>

<polygon points="14,22 26,16 38,22 34,28 26,30 18,28" fill="url(#sb15-rune)" filter="url(#sb15-soft)" opacity="0.6"/>
<!-- scrying orb on roof in three-pronged crystal cradle -->

<line x1="22" y1="20" x2="26" y2="16" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.5"/>
<line x1="30" y1="20" x2="26" y2="16" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.5"/>
<line x1="26" y1="21" x2="26" y2="16" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.5"/>

<circle cx="26" cy="13" r="5"   fill="url(#sb15-orb)" filter="url(#sb15-glow)"  opacity="0.92"/>
<circle cx="26" cy="13" r="3"   fill="#00ffee" opacity="0.25" filter="url(#sb15-glow)"/>
<circle cx="26" cy="13" r="1.5" fill="#fff" opacity="0.97"/>
<circle cx="26" cy="13" r="7"   fill="none" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.28" filter="url(#sb15-soft)"/>
<circle cx="26" cy="13" r="7"   fill="url(#sb15-rune)" filter="url(#sb15-hglow)" opacity="0.5"/>

<polygon points="6,20 10,16 12,20 10,30" fill="url(#sb15-pillar)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<circle cx="10" cy="15"  r="1.8" fill="url(#sb15-node)" filter="url(#sb15-glow)" opacity="0.88"/>
<circle cx="10" cy="15"  r="0.8" fill="#fff" opacity="0.95"/>
<line x1="6"  y1="22" x2="12" y2="20" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.3"/>
<!-- right knowledge-pillar antenna — asymmetric taller -->
<polygon points="40,16 44,12 46,16 44,28" fill="url(#sb15-pillar)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<circle cx="44" cy="11" r="2"   fill="url(#sb15-node)" filter="url(#sb15-glow)" opacity="0.88"/>
<circle cx="44" cy="11" r="0.9" fill="#fff" opacity="0.95"/>
<line x1="40" y1="18" x2="46" y2="16" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.3"/>
<!-- front wall -->
<polygon points="4,36 26,48 26,52 4,40" fill="url(#sb15-wall)"/>
<polygon points="26,48 48,36 48,40 26,52" fill="url(#sb15-side)" opacity="0.9"/>
<line x1="4" y1="36" x2="26" y2="48" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.32"/>
<!-- full-height prismatic window strip on front -->
<rect x="5" y="36" width="4" height="14" rx="0.3" fill="url(#sb15-window)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<line x1="5" y1="40" x2="9" y2="41" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.4"/>
<line x1="5" y1="44" x2="9" y2="45" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.35"/>
<line x1="5" y1="48" x2="9" y2="49" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.3"/>
<!-- void-light glow from window -->
<rect x="5" y="36" width="4" height="14" rx="0.3" fill="#00ffee" opacity="0.08" filter="url(#sb15-hglow)"/>
</svg>

Shards_Memorial:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 52 52">
<defs>
  <linearGradient id="sb20-plinth" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.2" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#143838"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#031414"/></linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="sb20-pside" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#082020"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#010909"/></linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="sb20-mono" x1="0.2" y1="0" x2="0.8" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0.6"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="#1a4040"/><stop offset="70%" stop-color="#0a2828"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#031414"/></linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="sb20-monoS" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0e2c2c"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#020909"/></linearGradient>
  <linearGradient id="sb20-flank" x1="0.3" y1="0" x2="0.7" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#0e3030"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#031212"/></linearGradient>
  <radialGradient id="sb20-flame" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="60%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff"/><stop offset="20%" stop-color="#00ffee"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0.6"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>
  <radialGradient id="sb20-inner" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="60%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0.25"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0.07"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>
  <radialGradient id="sb20-wash" cx="50%" cy="100%" r="80%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0.14"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00ffee" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>
  <filter id="sb20-glow" x="-80%" y="-80%" width="260%" height="260%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
  <filter id="sb20-hglow" x="-120%" y="-120%" width="340%" height="340%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="7" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
  <filter id="sb20-soft" x="-30%" y="-30%" width="160%" height="160%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.5" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
</defs>
<!-- ambient wash -->
<ellipse cx="26" cy="36" rx="22" ry="14" fill="url(#sb20-wash)" filter="url(#sb20-soft)" opacity="0.8"/>
<!-- stepped plinth -->
<polygon points="6,44 26,32 46,44 46,48 26,52 6,48" fill="url(#sb20-plinth)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<polygon points="6,44 26,32 26,44 6,48" fill="url(#sb20-pside)" opacity="0.85"/>
<polygon points="26,32 46,44 46,48 26,44" fill="#081414" opacity="0.9"/>
<line x1="6" y1="46" x2="46" y2="46" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.22"/>
<!-- two flanking smaller crystal obelisks -->
<polygon points="6,40 10,36 12,40 10,48" fill="url(#sb20-flank)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<polygon points="6,40 10,36 11,34 7,38" fill="#163a3a" opacity="0.4"/>
<polygon points="10,36 12,40 11,34" fill="#00ffee" opacity="0.45"/>
<polygon points="40,36 44,40 46,40 42,36" fill="url(#sb20-flank)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<polygon points="40,36 44,40 44,48 40,48" fill="url(#sb20-flank)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5"/>
<polygon points="40,36 44,36 42,32" fill="#00ffee" opacity="0.45"/>
<!-- main translucent crystal monolith -->
<polygon points="18,32 34,24 34,6 18,6" fill="url(#sb20-mono)" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.8"/>
<polygon points="18,32 34,24 36,22 20,30" fill="#1e4040" opacity="0.4"/>
<polygon points="34,24 40,28 40,8 34,6" fill="url(#sb20-monoS)" opacity="0.85"/>
<!-- inner radiance diffusing through crystal body -->
<polygon points="18,32 34,24 34,6 18,6" fill="url(#sb20-inner)" filter="url(#sb20-hglow)" opacity="0.9"/>
<!-- fractured-star emblem etched into face -->
<!-- outer star points — 8 point star -->
<line x1="26" y1="14" x2="26" y2="24" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.55"/>
<line x1="21" y1="15.5" x2="31" y2="22.5" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.5"/>
<line x1="31" y1="15.5" x2="21" y2="22.5" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.5"/>
<line x1="19" y1="19" x2="33" y2="19" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.5"/>
<!-- fractured crack lines through star -->
<line x1="24" y1="17" x2="22" y2="21" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.4"/>
<line x1="28" y1="15" x2="32" y2="22" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.35"/>
<line x1="20" y1="20" x2="24" y2="22" stroke="#00ffee" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.3"/>
<!-- star centre gem -->
<circle cx="26" cy="19" r="2.5" fill="url(#sb20-flame)" filter="url(#sb20-glow)"  opacity="0.9"/>
<circle cx="26" cy="19" r="1.2" fill="#fff" opacity="0.97"/>
<!-- void flame floating INSIDE the crystal — mid-body -->
<ellipse cx="26" cy="26" rx="3"   ry="4"   fill="url(#sb20-flame)" filter="url(#sb20-glow)"  opacity="0.85"/>
<ellipse cx="26" cy="28" rx="4.5" ry="5.5" fill="url(#sb20-inner)" filter="url(#sb20-hglow)" opacity="0.6"/>
<circle  cx="26" cy="25" r="1.2"  fill="#fff" opacity="0.97"/>
</svg>

<!-- base platform -->

<line x1="30" y1="18" x2="8"  y2="26" stroke="#ff6622" stroke-width="0.3"  opacity="0.2"  stroke-dasharray="2,2"/>

<path d="M32,22 Q40,18 44,22 Q42,28 32,26 Z" fill="url(#hb12-dish)" stroke="#ff6622" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.7"/>

<line x1="46" y1="6"  x2="48" y2="10" stroke="#ff6622" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.4"/>

<circle cx="22" cy="4"  r="1.5" fill="#fff" opacity="0.95"/>

<circle cx="22" cy="4" r="6"  fill="none" stroke="#ff6622" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.22" filter="url(#hb12-soft)"/>

<!-- green toxic runoff dripping down sides -->

<polygon points="28,16 46,28 44,38 28,28" fill="#020802" opacity="0.88"/>

<circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1.8" fill="#0a1a0a" stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="0.5"/>

<circle cx="21"  cy="20.5" r="0.6" fill="#44ff88" opacity="0.4"/>

<circle cx="39"  cy="20.5" r="0.5" fill="#44ff88" opacity="0.38"/>

<line x1="24" y1="37" x2="30" y2="37" stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.32"/>
<line x1="24" y1="41" x2="30" y2="41" stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.3"/>

<rect x="36" y="16" width="5" height="16" rx="1.5" fill="#0a1a0a" stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<ellipse cx="38.5" cy="16" rx="3.5" ry="2" fill="#081408" stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="0.5"/>

<ellipse cx="38.5" cy="13" rx="4"   ry="2"   fill="url(#nb01-smoke)" filter="url(#nb01-soft)" opacity="0.85"/>
<ellipse cx="38.5" cy="9"  rx="5.5" ry="2.5" fill="url(#nb01-smoke)" filter="url(#nb01-soft)" opacity="0.6"/>
<ellipse cx="38.5" cy="5"  rx="7"   ry="3"   fill="url(#nb01-smoke)" filter="url(#nb01-soft)" opacity="0.4"/>

<ellipse cx="38.5" cy="9"  rx="6" ry="3" fill="#44ff88" opacity="0.05" filter="url(#nb01-soft)"/>
</svg>

<path d="M29,8 Q38,4 42,8"   stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="0.6" fill="none" opacity="0.5"/>

<path d="M29,6 Q34,0 40,2"   stroke="#44ff88" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none" opacity="0.4"/>

<circle cx="40" cy="2"  r="0.8" fill="#44ff88" opacity="0.35"/>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 52 52">
<defs>
  <linearGradient id="ab19-roof" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0.2" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#181208"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#050402"/></linearGradient>

  <filter id="ab19-soft" x="-30%" y="-30%" width="160%" height="160%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.1" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
</defs>
<!-- plain flat roof — unremarkable logistics annex -->
<polygon points="4,26 26,14 48,26 48,36 26,48 4,36" fill="url(#ab19-roof)" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.7"/>
<polygon points="4,26 26,14 26,26 4,36" fill="#120e06" opacity="0.7"/>
<polygon points="26,14 48,26 48,36 26,26" fill="#060402" opacity="0.85"/>

<line x1="26" y1="14" x2="26" y2="36" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.12"/>
<line x1="39" y1="20" x2="39" y2="36" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.13"/>

<rect x="20" y="18" width="12" height="8" rx="0.4" fill="#1a1408" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.5"/>

<line x1="20" y1="20" x2="32" y2="20" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.38"/>
<line x1="20" y1="22" x2="32" y2="22" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.35"/>
<line x1="20" y1="24" x2="32" y2="24" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.32"/>

<circle cx="26" cy="22" r="1.8" fill="#ffaa22" opacity="0.1" filter="url(#ab19-dim)"/>

<line x1="44" y1="15" x2="46" y2="18" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.2"  opacity="0.18"/>

<line x1="4"  y1="29" x2="20" y2="29" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.18"/>
<line x1="32" y1="27" x2="48" y2="27" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.22"/>

<circle cx="32" cy="27" r="1.5" fill="url(#ab19-cable)" filter="url(#ab19-dim)" opacity="0.4"/>
<!-- front wall — plain -->

<polygon points="26,48 48,36 48,40 26,52" fill="url(#ab19-side)" opacity="0.9"/>
<line x1="4" y1="36" x2="26" y2="48" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.25"/>
<!-- plain cargo-bay style door — nothing special -->
<rect x="19" y="42" width="10" height="10" rx="0.3" fill="#0c0a04" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.6"/>
<line x1="19" y1="44" x2="29" y2="44" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.35"/>
<line x1="19" y1="46" x2="29" y2="46" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.28"/>
<line x1="19" y1="48" x2="29" y2="48" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.3"  opacity="0.22"/>

<line x1="4"  y1="36" x2="26" y2="48" stroke="#ffaa22" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.15" filter="url(#ab19-soft)"/>
<!-- tiny anomalous glow from behind grille — only if you look -->
<rect x="21" y="19" width="10" height="6" rx="0.2" fill="#ffaa22" opacity="0.04" filter="url(#ab19-soft)"/>
</svg>
